title: 12-Stock Portfolio -- 25 Growth Stocks to Buy Now
text: If I were starting a new growth stock portfolio today, here are the stocks I'd buy.

title: 2 Best Defensive Stocks to Buy in March
text: The central bank's plan to aggressively hike interest rates might trigger a sharp correction in U.S. stock markets. Axon Enterprise and NovoCure are two companies with economically insensitive business models, making them ideal safe-haven plays.

title: Why Axon Enterprise Stock Is Soaring 13% Higher This Week
text: The maker of Tasers and police body cameras sees massive new growth opportunities.

title: 3 Security Stocks Benefiting From The Growing Public-Safety Trend
text: If you've been paying attention to the news lately, you've undoubtedly noticed that public safety is becoming a big topic of conversation in communities, Congress, and the media. Whenever you spot a trend, it's a good idea to see if stocks benefit from these developments.

title: Why Axon Enterprise Stock Surged to an All-Time High Today
text: The stock is surging along with the underlying business.
